name: literature_review
description: Open literature-review stage contract for source-traceable discovery, screening, synthesis, and gap analysis.
intent: Discover, screen, synthesize, and review literature while preserving search, screening, citation, and interpretation traceability.
suggested_checks: interpretation separated from direct source evidence
handoff_notes: Record searched sources, search strings, inclusion criteria, inaccessible papers, key claims, and uncertain interpretations.
risk_notes: Do not fabricate citations, metadata, direct quotes, paper conclusions, or literature gaps.
